name: @tank/rust-patterns
description: Idiomatic Rust patterns for production apps. Ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, error handling (thiserror, anyhow), traits, generics, async/Tokio, design patterns (newtype, typestate, builder), serde, testing, CLI (clap, tracing), web (axum, sqlx), performance, and crate recommendations. Triggers: rust, ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, borrow checker, error handling, Result, async, tokio, traits, generics, serde, testing, clap, axum, rust patterns, idiomatic rust.
